task: Flagship expert task: Evaluate three DAC sorbent beds using only the embedded packet. Compute per-bed pass/fail against limits (breakthrough <= 500 ppm, pressure_drop <= 1100 Pa, capture >= 850 kg/day). Calculate revenue loss from capture shortfall, and compute total cost for feasible mitigation packages (bed swap, deep regeneration, controlled derate). Consider costs and tradeoffs over a 21-day horizon given: bed_swap_cost = $210,000/bed; deep_regen_cost = $48,000/bed (reduces breakthrough by 28%, increases pressure drop by 9%); derate_15pct (reduces dp by 20% and loses $17,000/day). Use carbon_price = $185/tonne to compute CO2 revenue impacts where relevant. Produce an executable model (Excel) and an operations committee note (Markdown) that include formulas/executable logic, intermediate calculations with row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels, and a recommended action package that either brings all beds to pass or justifies a controlled derate. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
